{{Quote|Two hundred years ago, the people there had a very great culture, and they built some of the better starships in the galaxy—small luxury cruisers.|Isolder, to Teneniel Djo|<ref name="copl" />}}
The '''Fere''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Fere]]e. They were considered to be master shipbuilders of their time.<ref name="copl" />

The average Fere was a tall, ivory-skinned being with six fingers on each [[Limb/Legends|hand]]. Around [[192 BBY]], the entire [[Species/Legends|species]] was wiped out by a planet-wide plague that struck their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="copl" />

==Appearances==
